You are applying a code migration fix.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/shared/src/topology/sidebar/node/NodeDetails.tsx
Line: 47, 54, 61, 69, 78, 86, 93, 100, 110, 123, 134, 141, 148, 155, 162, 169, 176, 183

Migration rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <DescriptionListTerm> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</DescriptionListTerm>

Incident context:
  componentName: DescriptionListTerm
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: DescriptionListGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: DescriptionListTerm
Prop: icon

content.text:
Now let me analyze the situation. The migration rule says:

> In PatternFly v6, icon content in `<DescriptionListTerm>` must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

Looking at every `<DescriptionListTerm>` in this file, **none of them contain icon elements**. They all contain only text content via `{t('...')}` calls — things like `{t('Name')}`, `{t('Role')}`, `{t('Instance type')}`, etc.

The migration rule specifically states:
- If `<DescriptionListTerm>` contains **only an icon element** (from `@patternfly/react-icons`), move it to the `icon` prop
- If `<DescriptionListTerm>` contains **an icon AND text**, move just the icon

Since none of these `<DescriptionListTerm>` usages contain any icons from `@patternfly/react-icons`, **no changes are needed**. The rule was triggered because of the structural pattern match (DescriptionListTerm inside DescriptionListGroup), but the actual content doesn't match the migration scenario.

## Changes Applied

**No changes applied.** The migration rule `sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm` targets `<DescriptionListTerm>` elements that contain icon components from `@patternfly/react-icons`. All 18 instances in this file contain only text children (e.g., `{t('Name')}`, `{t('Role')}`, `{t('Status')}`), with no icon elements present. The rule does not apply to these usages.
